result.name: Condition remover
result.description: Level: 1d6 + 3 Effect: Cures one occurrence of one specific health condition of the cypher level or lower. It does not prevent the possibility of future occurrences of the same condition. Roll a [[/r d20]] to determine what it cures. 1Addiction to one substance2Autoimmune disease3Bacterial infection4Bad breath5Blisters6Bloating7Cancer8Chapped lips9Flatus10Hangover11Heartburn12Hiccups13Ingrown hairs14Insomnia15Joint problem16Muscle cramp17Pimples18Psychosis19Stiff neck20Viral infection

sections.name: Condition remover
sections.effect:
Level: 1d6 + 3

Effect: Cures one occurrence of one specific health condition of the cypher level or lower. It does not prevent the possibility of future occurrences of the same condition. Roll a [[/r d20]] to determine what it cures.
